name: io.github.carsonroell-debug/sitehealth-mcp
title: SiteHealth MCP
description: Full website health audit — SSL, DNS, DMARC/SPF/DKIM, performance, uptime, links

tools.name: audit_site
tools.description: Full website health audit — SSL, DNS, email auth, performance, uptime, broken links. Returns 0-100 score with recommendations.

tools.name: check_ssl
tools.description: SSL certificate validity, expiry, issuer, and protocol check

tools.name: check_dns
tools.description: DNS record resolution — A, AAAA, MX, NS, CNAME, TXT, SOA

tools.name: check_email_auth
tools.description: Validate DMARC, SPF, and DKIM records with fix recommendations

tools.name: check_performance
tools.description: Page speed — TTFB, load time, page weight, compression, caching

tools.name: check_uptime
tools.description: HTTP ping with response time measurement

tools.name: check_links
tools.description: Scan page for broken links (4xx/5xx responses)
